name: CloudCheckr Cloud Management API
what_it_does: Multi-cloud management platform with REST API — providing cloud cost optimization, security and compliance monitoring, resource inventory, rightsizing recommendations, reserved instance management, and chargeback/showback for MSPs and enterprises managing AWS, Azure, and GCP environments.
use_cases: Querying cloud cost data by account, service, and tag for FinOps reporting
Pulling security finding alerts and compliance status for cloud security dashboards
Accessing rightsizing recommendations for cost optimization automation
Managing multi-account cloud inventory and resource discovery via API
Building MSP customer billing reports from CloudCheckr chargeback data
not_for: Real-time cloud resource provisioning (use Terraform or cloud-native IaC)
Single-cloud-only environments with native cloud tools sufficient (use AWS Cost Explorer)
Small organizations with minimal cloud spend
best_when: An MSP or enterprise with multi-cloud environments (AWS + Azure + GCP) needs unified cost, security, and inventory visibility with chargeback reporting for customers or internal teams.
avoid_when: You're single-cloud with native tooling sufficient, need infrastructure automation (not just visibility), or have simple cloud spend without chargeback requirements.

auth.notes: API access key from CloudCheckr account. Passed as access_key query parameter or header. Account-specific access keys. No OAuth2. Webhook for alert events. Acquired by Spot.io (NetApp) — may affect API roadmap. Sub-account keys for MSP multi-tenant management.

pricing.notes: Rochester, NY company. Founded 2011. Acquired by Spot.io (NetApp) in 2021. Strong MSP focus with multi-tenant support. AWS, Azure, GCP support. CSPM (Cloud Security Posture Management) built-in. Reserved instance analysis and management. 350+ best practice checks. MSP-friendly chargeback and invoicing.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for cost reports, security findings, inventory, and recommendations. access_key query parameter auth. Good documentation. Spot.io acquisition may affect API roadmap — verify current documentation status. Account-specific endpoints for MSP multi-tenant. Report data has processing latency from cloud provider ingestion.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Cost report reads fully idempotent by date range. Security finding reads idempotent. Inventory reads idempotent. Recommendation reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: API key in query parameter (access_key) — avoid logging request URLs with key exposed
Spot.io (NetApp) acquisition may affect API availability and roadmap
Cloud cost data has 24-48 hour processing lag from cloud providers
MSP sub-account management requires understanding of CloudCheckr account hierarchy
Security compliance checks are point-in-time — run-on-demand vs scheduled

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and FedRAMP compliant. GDPR compliant. US data residency. API key in query parameter — log scrubbing required. Cloud account credentials stored by CloudCheckr — evaluate trust model for cross-account access. NetApp acquisition brings enterprise security standards.
